posts.title: Biophilic Office Design: How Artificial Plants Transform Commercial Spaces in 2026
posts.description: Discover how artificial plants and biophilic design create sustainable, low-maintenance commercial spaces. Learn about cost savings, aesthetic benefits, and implementation strategies for offices, lobbies, and corporate environments.

posts.title: Are Artificial Plants Fire Safe for Commercial Buildings?
posts.description: Yes, artificial plants can be fire safe for commercial buildings when they meet NFPA 701 standards. Learn about fire safety compliance requirements for hotels, offices, and commercial properties.

posts.title: NFPA 701 Explained: What Hotel Designers Need to Know About Artificial Plant Fire Codes
posts.description: If you're specifying artificial plants for a hotel or commercial property in the United States, NFPA 701 is non-negotiable. Here's what it means, how to verify compliance, and what questions to ask your supplier.

posts.title: 5 Artificial Plant Trends Dominating Hotel Lobbies in 2025
posts.description: From oversized statement palms to full-ceiling hanging installations, here are the artificial plant trends our hotel clients are requesting most this year.

posts.title: How Green Walls Increased This Restaurant's Revenue by 22%
posts.description: A case study showing how a single green wall installation transformed dwell time, social media mentions, and covers per evening at a Sydney restaurant.

posts.title: PE vs PVC: Why Material Matters in Artificial Plants
posts.description: Not all artificial plant materials are equal. Here's the definitive guide to why PE (polyethylene) is the commercial standard — and what to look for when evaluating suppliers.

posts.title: Biophilic Design on a Budget: Artificial Plants in Corporate Offices
posts.description: The research is clear — nature in the workplace improves focus, reduces stress, and lowers absenteeism. Here's how to achieve biophilic design without live plant maintenance costs.

posts.title: Outdoor Artificial Plants: UV Rating Guide for Terrace & Pool Installations
posts.description: Not all artificial plants are suitable for outdoor use. This guide explains UV ratings, expected lifespan, and what to look for when specifying outdoor commercial installations.

posts.title: How to Specify Artificial Plants: A Checklist for Interior Designers
posts.description: A practical checklist covering fire certification, material grade, sizing, vessel options, and supplier vetting — everything you need to specify artificial plants with confidence.

posts.title: Elevating Outdoor Hospitality: A Site Visit to JoJo's Riverside Rooftop
posts.description: A site visit to JoJo's Riverside Rooftop exploring lighting, faux greenery, and durable design for wind-exposed rooftop environments with skyline views.
